Smart objects keep the text fully editable;How to Transform Photos into Oil Paintings Using Generative Fill in PhotoshopGenerative Fill can transform ordinary photographs into convincing oil paintings when combined with the right selection technique. The key is using channel-based selections rather than selecting the entire image, which allows the AI to apply painterly effects while preserving the original composition and lighting.

This method also works for watercolor effects and other artistic styles. Adding texture and brush stroke details through layer styles creates even more realistic painted results.
